titleStmt.title: SII 20.80: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 80. (B.K. No. 94 of 1936-37.) BIJAPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This record is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 46, Śārvvari, Āśvayuja, Amāvāsyā, Monday, solar eclipse corresponding to A.D. 1120, October 24, the weekday being Sunday.
The inscription records a gift of land to the temple of god Mūlasthāna, built by Daṇḍanāyaka Sōmarasa, the prabhu of Sindige, by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kumāra Jayakarṇadēva and Manneya Siṅgarasa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhē (saṁbhavē)
vṛtta . puduvēkiṁnārggavānōrvvane taḷeyalidaṁ sālguveṁdā mahākū
rmmada beṁniṁdā bhujaṁgādvipana peḍegaḷiṁdā diśāsiṁndhuraskaṁdhadinā bhūsundarīma
ḷavinakhiḷadharābhāratiṁtandu vikrāntada balpiṁ taṁna tōḷoḻu paduḻavirisidaṁ vi
kramādityadēvaṁ . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja pa
ramēsvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḻatiḻakaṁ cāḻukyābharaṇa śrīma
tṛbhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravardhdhamānamācaṁ
drārkkatāraṁ sale rājadhāni jayantīpurada nelevīḍinoḻu sukhasaṁkathāvinōda
diṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēsvara ripurāyaku
vara madanamahēsvara samarabhagadattakaṁndhara . madanasaundaryyabandhura . matimukuraprati biṁbita
sakaḻamaṁtradharṁmmaparataṁtra yaparikaḻpanōpadra yācakacakōracaṁdra (.) naribirudaku
vara hridayabhīṣaṇa (.) nabhimānabhūśaṇa (.) nakaḻaṁkakṣatradhāma . cāḻukyakuḻakuvaḻe
yasōma . vidaḻitavidvatjanavipallava . vāguvallarīnavapallava . kīrttinarttakī samāḻaṁbitakha
gadaṁṇḍa (.) napratihatavijayavēdaṇḍa . pratibhaṭahṛdayavighaṭanapaṭusāyaka . vidagdhamu
madyanāyaka gurujananiyamaniyānuga . śrīmatṛbhuvanamalla
raṇugina kumāraṁ śrīmanu mahāmaṇḍaḻēsvara ku
māra śrī jayakaṁrnadēvaruṁ .
© svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahā
mahāmaṇḍaḷēsva
seḻaṟavaṁsōdbhava vibhavādharīkritapurūrava parahitabyasa
na jīmūtavāhanānvayaprasūta sauryaraghujāta boṭṭineṟaga girivajradaṁṇḍa vidagdha
kāminījanahṛdayakusmakōdaṇḍa virōdhimaṁneyatārakāsurakārttikē
ya ceṁnamaṁneyapaṁnegavainatēya . Udeganaṁkakāṟa narasaṁkasūnagāṟa śrīmatri
bhuvanamalladēvapādārādhaka paramaṇḍaḷasādhaka nāmādi prasastisahitaṁ śrīma
numahāmaṇḍaḷēsvara siṁgarasaru Oṭṭajeyoḻillene nriparoḷ puṭṭidanene negaḷda ku
nulaṁge boppule bīraṁ puṭṭuvavoludeganripatige puṭṭidarasaṁkasū
drakaṁ siṁganripa . cōḻakuḻaviḻayakāḻaṁ kāḻāmukhaprāhitōddhatāhi
tamāḻaṁ māḻavarājakasūḻaṁ sūḻeyuvacaraṇakamaḻaḥbhriṁgaṁ siṁga . vri
tta . tāvare neyidaluṁ kosagu saṁpage mallige molleyelliyuṁ tīvida perggoḻaṁ ke
ṟeyu bāviyuvoppuva dēvatā . cayaṁ pūvina tōṁṭamuṁ kaḻavegaddeya
rāṭaṇavalligalligaṁ bhāvisi nōḍaliṁdrana purakkeṇeyādudu sindikāpu
raṁ . Ūrinda poṟage baḻasida nāraṁgada mātuḻuṁga māvina banadiṁdōrante karame soga
yiku dhāriṇiyoḻu sindikāpuraṁ kara celva . Antā purake prabhu kaṁnaḍakuḻakumu
dasaracaṁdrana bhāradvājānvayaventeṁdaḍe . karadoḻivarkkavetteseva śaṁkhamuvoppuva ca
kraveṁbavī yeraḍeyuvaladantavaṟa bhaṁgiya rēkheya lāṁcanaṁ podaḻdire karayagma
doḻu negardda viṣṇuve mānasanāgi puṭṭidantire siri porddi pēruradoḻoppire nāraṇa
dēvanoppida . Antāyanagratanūja . vṛtta . harahāsapratimānanirmmaḻa
yaśaḥśrīrāmanaṁ rāmabhīkarabāṇōgrananugrapādakamaḻōdyadūbhriṁga
naṁ bhriṁgabaṁndhuranīḻāḻakajāḻasākṣarara sārcirjātanaṁ jātasākṣarasaṁprītananentu
baṇnipeno dharmmakkārmmanaṁ barmmana . baliyiṁ nāṁṭi viyaccarakuḻapatiyiṁ baḷḷivaridu vaikarttaraniṁ sale pūttha
dānalate satuphaḻavādudu sōmanāthadaṇḍādhipaniṁ . sōmaṁge vinaya lakṣmī dhāmaṁge kavīṁdranikaradi
vijamahījārāmaṁge vipravaṁsalalāmaṁge mahēśanīge sāsvatapadama . svasti śrīmacāḻukyavikramava
rśada 46 neya sārvari(ri) saṁvatsarada Āśvaijadamavāsye sōmavāra sūryyagrahaṇadandu
haṁneraḍaṟa modalabāḍaṁ sindigeya prabhudaṇḍanāyakaṁ surigeya sōvarasaṁ māḍisida śrī
mūlasthānadadēvargge khaṇḍaspuṭita jīrnnōddhāra dīpavartti nivēdyakkendu kumāra jayakaṁrnnadēvaruṁ maṁne
yaṁsiṁgara sanuṁ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭa keyi paḍuvala pola kaṁna vaḷḷiya baṭṭe yiṁ baḍaThe letterra is engraved below the line.
gu sīme kaṁṭiya haḷḷadiṁ mūḍa basadiya gaḍiṁbada kōla matta 60 banadahaḷḷiyiṁ baḍaga gardde ma
tta 1 gaṇiyārada baṭṭeyiṁ mūḍa tōṭa matta 1 mūḍaṇa taradaṁgaḍi 12 vāradeṇne sahita
dēvariṁ paḍuva kuḷiyakēri jīvitada nivēśaṇa 6 kāḷagadāyaṁ poṁge vīsa 2 . vūroḻage māṟida bhaṁḍakke
kejjuṁka bilukoḍe vaḍḍarāvuḷa mūlege baḷḷa 1 Eleya kēṟiṁge 201 Aḍakepāga 10 ©
Digital edition of SII 20.80 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
